change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
Mapping of community groups (2days*2 districts*30 person) per diem, food, local travel and stationery, staff travel cost to selected VDCs
	
		Trainings of LRPs (20 days for 270 individuals ) per diem, travel cost, lodging
	
		Interaction with community groups and CSOs by LRPs (2 districts, 270 LRP *10 events) per diem LRP, meetings snacks and tea.
	
		IEC Materials /Safe passage kits
	
		Create Revolving Fund
	
		Training of CHBC workers: 270 people X 2 weeks residential trainings
	
		Incentive to CHBC workers: per person Rs.10000per year (only 2 years)
	
		Purchase of CHBC Kits: (270*2500)
	
		Training of key community leaders on stigma and discrimination: (30 events )
	
		Talk program and campaign by PLHIV and other professionals (2 events per year, per district) for all 3 years
	
		Radio message (per month Rs.20000) for 2 years
	
		Training of women networks in far west region (NFWORC) 30 persons, 3 days  in each districts
	
		Orientation to  community groups at VDC level on resource mobilization and financial management (2 days for 540 persons) non-residential
	
		Follow up and advocacy (per year one event for 540 persons) one day only per event
	
		Sensitization and orientation workshop  with district stakeholders (1 day orientation, 3 events in each districts)
	
		Awareness/mainstreaming workshop to district line agencies workshop on national action plan to DACC (2 days workshop in each districts)
	
		Bridging workshop at district level, including the focus group discussion (1 day workshop, 5 event per districts)
	
		Follow up bridging workshop (5 events in each districts for 2 years)
	
		HIV service need assessment (technical assistance  fees and travel cost
	
		VCT/ART/PMTCT strengthening through training
	
		Technical support to prepare DARP plan (technical consultants) 10 days in each districts (fees and other associated cost)
	
		Publication and disseminations of DARP.
	
		Monitoring of DARP implementation bi-annual visit one year 2 and 3
	
		Support to DACC and NCASC
	
		Workshop on resource mobilization with district stakeholders (one event per district), 2 days workshop
	
		Follow up and advocacy workshop on resource mobilization (1 event per year per district)
	
		Learning and interaction visit of policy makers to the project district (5 persons, from national level, for 10 days for 2 districts) 2nd year and 3rd year
	
		Interaction visit of PLHIV with service providers and networks such as NAPN+, National , NFWLHA (inter district) 2 events each year
	
		Establish seed money under DPHO Basket fund for transportation, nutrition and other emergency support.
	
		Orientation to health service providers on referral service, OI treatment, friendly service delivery (2 days 1 batch of 20 people in each districts)
	
		Review workshop with health workers
	
		Orientation workshop (project wise , 2 days ,30 participants) consultant for 5 days@15000
	
		Migration, women and HIV (orientation at CO level) to CARE Staffs (consultant for 5 days)
	
		Exposure and capacity building of project staff
	
		National level conference (at Kathmandu), 1 event

en.full: Strengthening State and Civil Society Capacity for Comprehensive Response to HIV/AIDS (Bharosa)
